privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overview_text: General Market is operated by IM Standards LLC. It consists of two products: Index (on-chain index tracking products) and Vision (peer-to-peer prediction markets). This policy covers both products. We collect minimal data and prioritize your privacy.
privacy.collect_wallets_desc: Public blockchain addresses used for trading on both Index and Vision
privacy.collect_txs_desc: On-chain trading activity (publicly visible on the Index L3 chain)
privacy.collect_analytics_desc: Page views and feature usage via PostHog to improve the platform. No personal identifiers are linked.
privacy.no_collect_keys: Private keys — these never leave your local environment
privacy.no_collect_identity: Personal identity — we don't require KYC or personal information
privacy.no_collect_browsing: Browsing history — we don't use tracking cookies or sell data to advertisers
privacy.no_collect_positions: Trading positions or strategies — your Index ITP compositions and Vision bets are on-chain, not stored by us off-chain
privacy.blockchain_text: All trading activity on both Index and Vision occurs on the Index L3 chain, a public blockchain. Your wallet address and transaction history are publicly visible on block explorers. This is inherent to blockchain technology, not a choice we make.
privacy.storage_index: Index: ITP configurations, compositions, and order data are stored on-chain. Off-chain data (price feeds, NAV calculations) is processed by BLS-verified issuers and stored temporarily.
privacy.storage_vision: Vision: Prediction market entries, batch data, and settlement outcomes are stored on-chain. Off-chain data (data source feeds, market snapshots) is processed by authorized issuers and cached temporarily.
privacy.third_party_index: Index interacts with CoinGecko for price data and Morpho for lending markets.
privacy.third_party_vision: Vision references publicly available data from 60+ third-party sources including government agencies (FRED, SEC, NOAA, USGS, EIA), public APIs (CoinGecko, GitHub, npm, Steam, Twitch), and other publicly accessible feeds. Vision does not scrape, redistribute, or resell the underlying data.
privacy.third_party_no_sell: IM Standards LLC does not sell or share your data with advertisers or data brokers.
privacy.contact_text: Questions about this privacy policy? Reach out on X:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptance_text: By using General Market (including both Index and Vision products), you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, don't use the platform. These terms apply to all products operated by IM Standards LLC.
terms.what_is_text: General Market is a decentralized protocol operated by IM Standards LLC on the Index L3 chain (Arbitrum Orbit). It consists of two products:
terms.what_is_index: Index — Create, trade, and manage tokenized index tracking products (ITPs). ITPs are on-chain baskets of crypto assets with NAV pricing, similar to ETFs but entirely on-chain. Prices are submitted by decentralized, Goldilocks-selected BLS-verified issuers — not by IM Standards LLC.
terms.what_is_vision: Vision — Peer-to-peer prediction markets across 60+ data sources. Users trade event contracts against each other via smart contracts. IM Standards LLC does not act as counterparty, bookmaker, or market maker.
terms.risk_bold: You can lose money on both Index and Vision.
terms.risk_text: Index: ITP values fluctuate with underlying crypto asset prices. Vision: prediction market outcomes are uncertain by nature. You could lose some or all of your capital on either product. Only use funds you can afford to lose.
terms.experimental_text: General Market is experimental software. Smart contracts are immutable once deployed — bugs cannot be patched. Use at your own risk. IM Standards LLC makes no guarantees about security, uptime, or functionality for either product.
terms.non_custodial_text: IM Standards LLC does not custody, hold, or control user funds at any time. Your assets remain in smart contracts on the Index L3 chain that you interact with directly through your wallet. IM Standards LLC cannot freeze, reverse, or modify your transactions.
terms.responsibilities_keys: You control your private keys — IM Standards LLC cannot recover them if lost
terms.responsibilities_decisions: You're solely responsible for your trading and investment decisions on both Index and Vision
terms.responsibilities_laws: You must comply with all applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction
terms.responsibilities_tax: You're responsible for all tax obligations on any profits from either product
terms.responsibilities_research: You must conduct your own research before creating or trading ITPs or entering Vision markets
terms.no_advice_text: Nothing on General Market is financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. IM Standards LLC does not recommend specific trades, index compositions, prediction market positions, or strategies.
terms.prohibited_manipulation: Market manipulation or wash trading on either product
terms.prohibited_exploits: Exploiting bugs or vulnerabilities in smart contracts or the platform
terms.prohibited_interfere: Interfering with other users or the protocol's operation
terms.prohibited_illegal: Using the platform for illegal activity in your jurisdiction
terms.liability_text: General Market (both Index and Vision) is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, IM Standards LLC shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of either product. Total aggregate liability shall not exceed the lesser of (a) amounts you deposited in the 12 months preceding the claim, or (b) $100 USD.
terms.indemnification_text: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless IM Standards LLC and its officers, directors, members, employees, agents, and affiliates from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses arising out of your use of General Market or violation of these terms.
terms.governing_text: These terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which IM Standards LLC is organized. Disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration.
terms.changes_text: IM Standards LLC may update these terms. Continued use after changes means you accept the new terms.

legal_vision.title: Vision — Legal Disclaimer
legal_vision.overview_text: Vision is a peer-to-peer prediction market protocol operated by IM Standards LLC. It enables users to create and trade event contracts on publicly available data outcomes across 60+ data sources. This page sets out the legal basis for Vision's operations, data usage, and your rights and obligations as a user.
legal_vision.p2p_text: Vision operates as a peer-to-peer protocol. All trades are executed between users via smart contracts deployed on the Index L3 chain (Arbitrum Orbit). IM Standards LLC does not act as a counterparty, bookmaker, or market maker in any transaction.
legal_vision.p2p_no_house: No house edge — Vision does not take positions against users. There is no "house" to bet against.
legal_vision.p2p_no_counterparty: No counterparty risk from the operator — IM Standards LLC never holds the other side of any trade.
legal_vision.p2p_smart_contract: Settlement is automated — outcomes are resolved by on-chain smart contracts using BLS-verified data feeds from independent issuers.
legal_vision.p2p_no_custodial: Non-custodial — your funds remain in smart contracts on the blockchain. IM Standards LLC does not custody, hold, or control user funds at any time.
legal_vision.data_text: Vision markets reference publicly available data from third-party sources including government agencies (FRED, SEC, EIA, NOAA, USGS, BLS, NRC), academic databases (OpenAlex, PubMed, Crossref), public APIs (CoinGecko, GitHub, npm, Steam, Twitch), and other publicly accessible data feeds. Vision does not scrape, redistribute, or resell the underlying data. Markets are event contracts that reference publicly observable outcomes — they do not reproduce, store, or display proprietary content from these sources.
legal_vision.data_nominative: Where third-party names, trademarks, or brands appear on Vision, they are used solely for the purpose of identifying the relevant data source or event. This constitutes nominative fair use under applicable trademark law: the data source cannot be identified without reference to its name, only as much of the mark as necessary is used, and no sponsorship or endorsement by the trademark owner is implied or intended.
legal_vision.delisting_text: If you are a data provider, rights holder, or representative of an entity referenced on Vision and wish to have related markets or references removed, we will honor your request. IM Standards LLC maintains a voluntary delisting policy — we do not require a formal legal takedown notice. We aim to process removal requests within 7 business days.
legal_vision.delisting_contact: To request removal, contact us on X at @otc_max or through any official General Market communication channel. Please identify the specific markets or references you wish removed and your relationship to the data source.
legal_vision.ip_text: All third-party trademarks, service marks, trade names, and logos displayed on Vision are the property of their respective owners. Their appearance on Vision does not constitute:
legal_vision.ip_no_endorsement: An endorsement of Vision or IM Standards LLC by any third party
legal_vision.ip_no_affiliation: An affiliation, partnership, or commercial relationship between IM Standards LLC and any third party
legal_vision.ip_referential: Anything other than a referential use to identify the publicly available data source for a given market
legal_vision.risk_bold: Prediction market trading involves substantial risk of loss.
legal_vision.risk_text: You can lose some or all of your capital. Event outcomes are uncertain by nature. Past market performance does not predict future results. Only participate with funds you can afford to lose entirely.
legal_vision.risk_smart_contract: Smart contract risk — contracts are immutable once deployed and may contain undiscovered bugs or vulnerabilities
legal_vision.risk_oracle: Oracle risk — data feed accuracy depends on third-party sources and the issuer network; incorrect or delayed data may affect settlement
legal_vision.risk_liquidity: Liquidity risk — you may not be able to exit a position at your desired price or timing
legal_vision.risk_regulatory: Regulatory risk — prediction markets may be subject to evolving regulations in your jurisdiction
legal_vision.no_advice_text: Nothing on Vision constitutes financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. IM Standards LLC does not recommend any specific market, position, or strategy. You are solely responsible for evaluating the merits and risks of any transaction.
legal_vision.disclaimer_text: Vision is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, or statutory, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title, and non-infringement. IM Standards LLC does not warrant that Vision will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or free from bugs, viruses, or other harmful components.
legal_vision.liability_text: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, IM Standards LLC, its officers, directors, members, employees, agents, and affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, revenue, data, or use, arising out of or related to your use of Vision, regardless of the theory of liability. Total aggregate liability shall not exceed the lesser of (a) the amounts you deposited to Vision in the 12 months preceding the claim, or (b) $100 USD.
legal_vision.indemnification_text: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless IM Standards LLC and its officers, directors, members, employees, agents, and affiliates from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to your use of Vision, your violation of these terms, or your violation of any law or third-party rights.
legal_vision.governing_text: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which IM Standards LLC is organized, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration.
legal_vision.contact_text: Questions about this legal disclaimer? Reach out on X:

legal_index.title: Index Products — Legal Disclaimer
legal_index.overview_text: General Market Index is a decentralized protocol operated by IM Standards LLC for creating and trading on-chain index tracking products (ITPs). ITPs are tokenized baskets of crypto assets that function similarly to ETFs but are entirely on-chain. This page sets out the legal basis for the protocol, the nature of ITPs, and your rights and obligations as a user.
legal_index.nature_text: ITPs are experimental, unregistered, on-chain financial instruments. They are not equivalent to, and should not be confused with, traditional financial products:
legal_index.nature_not_securities: ITPs are not securities — they are not registered with the SEC, CFTC, or any other regulatory body. No filing, prospectus, or offering document has been prepared or submitted. There is no central party whose efforts drive returns.
legal_index.nature_not_investment: ITPs are not investment contracts — there is no expectation of profit derived from the managerial efforts of IM Standards LLC or any third party. ITPs track a fixed basket of assets with quantities locked at creation; NAV floats purely with market prices. No one manages, rebalances, or makes investment decisions on your behalf.
legal_index.nature_not_fund: ITPs are not funds — IM Standards LLC does not manage assets, allocate capital, or exercise discretion over any ITP. There is no fund manager, investment advisor, portfolio manager, or fiduciary relationship. Users create their own compositions and bear full responsibility for their asset selection.
legal_index.nature_experimental: ITPs are experimental software — the protocol is deployed on immutable smart contracts. Bugs cannot be patched after deployment.
legal_index.nature_decentralized_issuers: Price feeds are submitted by a decentralized network of independent issuers, selected through a Goldilocks consensus mechanism and verified via BLS aggregate signatures. IM Standards LLC does not submit prices, select issuers, or control the consensus process. This further decouples the protocol from any single operator's efforts.
legal_index.protocol_text: General Market Index operates as an autonomous, non-custodial protocol on the Index L3 chain (Arbitrum Orbit):
legal_index.protocol_non_custodial: Non-custodial — IM Standards LLC does not custody, hold, or control user funds. Your assets remain in smart contracts that you interact with directly through your wallet.
legal_index.protocol_immutable: Immutable contracts — core logic is deployed to immutable smart contracts. IM Standards LLC cannot unilaterally alter, freeze, or reverse transactions after deployment.
legal_index.protocol_transparent: Fully transparent — all ITP compositions, NAV calculations, trades, and settlement are verifiable on-chain by any party.
legal_index.pricing_text: ITP prices are determined by Net Asset Value (NAV), calculated as the sum of (quantity per share × current price) for each underlying asset. Prices are sourced from CoinGecko and submitted by BLS-verified independent issuers. IM Standards LLC does not set, manipulate, or guarantee ITP prices. NAV may diverge from true market value due to price feed latency, source outages, or low liquidity in underlying assets.
legal_index.risk_bold: You can lose money. ITPs are high-risk, experimental instruments.
legal_index.risk_text: ITP values fluctuate with underlying crypto asset prices, which are inherently volatile. You could lose some or all of your capital. Past performance does not predict future results. Only use funds you can afford to lose entirely.
legal_index.risk_smart_contract: Smart contract risk — contracts are immutable and may contain undiscovered bugs, vulnerabilities, or economic exploits
legal_index.risk_price: Price risk — underlying assets are volatile cryptocurrencies; NAV can drop rapidly and without warning
legal_index.risk_oracle: Oracle risk — price data depends on CoinGecko feeds and the issuer network; inaccurate or delayed data may cause incorrect NAV calculation
legal_index.risk_liquidity: Liquidity risk — you may be unable to buy or sell ITP shares at the desired price if there are insufficient counterparties
legal_index.risk_regulatory: Regulatory risk — on-chain index products may be subject to evolving regulations in your jurisdiction
legal_index.no_advice_text: Nothing on General Market constitutes financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. IM Standards LLC does not recommend any specific ITP, asset allocation, or trading strategy. You are solely responsible for evaluating the merits and risks of any transaction.
legal_index.responsibilities_keys: You control your private keys — IM Standards LLC cannot recover lost keys or reverse transactions
legal_index.responsibilities_decisions: You are solely responsible for your trading and investment decisions
legal_index.responsibilities_laws: You must comply with all applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction
legal_index.responsibilities_tax: You are responsible for all tax obligations arising from your use of the protocol
legal_index.responsibilities_research: You must conduct your own research and due diligence before creating or trading any ITP
legal_index.disclaimer_text: General Market Index is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, or statutory, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title, and non-infringement. IM Standards LLC does not warrant that the protocol will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or free from bugs, viruses, or other harmful components.
legal_index.liability_text: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, IM Standards LLC, its officers, directors, members, employees, agents, and affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, revenue, data, or use, arising out of or related to your use of General Market Index, regardless of the theory of liability. Total aggregate liability shall not exceed the lesser of (a) the amounts you deposited to the protocol in the 12 months preceding the claim, or (b) $100 USD.
legal_index.indemnification_text: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless IM Standards LLC and its officers, directors, members, employees, agents, and affiliates from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to your use of General Market Index, your violation of these terms, or your violation of any law or third-party rights.
legal_index.governing_text: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which IM Standards LLC is organized, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration.
legal_index.contact_text: Questions about this legal disclaimer? Reach out on X:
